title: camissonia subacaulis
intro: Camissonia subacaulis, also known as the annual camissonia or sand evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of camissonia subacaulis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against cellular damage. Camissonia subacaulis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve to harness its medicinal properties and is often used in traditional herbal remedies.
